name: FactSet FQL Price-Series Dictionary (sample)
description: Corrected FQL formula dictionary for pulling clean daily price/volume time series and point-in-time reference data from FactSet via the FDS() Excel function. Uses rolling-from-today daily series (date args COMMA-separated inside the field parentheses, most-recent-first: P_PRICE(0D,-250D,D)), volume via P_VOLUME_DAY, and ADV computed in-app (Tab 3). Indicators are NOT pulled here; they are computed in-app (Tab 3).

price.label: Daily closing price
price.notes: Closing price time series. Date args are COMMA-separated INSIDE the field parentheses, most-recent-first: start=0D (today/most-recent trading day), end=-250D (lookback), freq D=daily. Example: P_PRICE(0D,-250D,D).

volume.label: Daily volume
volume.notes: Daily share volume time series via P_VOLUME_DAY (NOT P_VOLUME). Comma-separated, most-recent-first. Example: P_VOLUME_DAY(0D,-250D,D).

price_point.label: Closing price (single date / spot)
price_point.notes: Single point-in-time close, e.g. P_PRICE(0D) = latest close. Used by the Method B offset grid (one self-contained single-date formula per row).

volume_point.label: Volume (single date / spot)
volume_point.notes: Single point-in-time daily volume, e.g. P_VOLUME_DAY(0D). Used by the Method B offset grid.

date_point.label: Trading date (single date / best-effort)
date_point.notes: Best-effort per-row trading date. Some FactSet setups lack a standalone P_DATE field; in the time-series spill FactSet provides the date column automatically next to the price spill.

adv_usd_20d.label: 20-day average daily value traded (USD) — OPTIONAL, computed in-app
adv_usd_20d.notes: OPTIONAL. There is no P_ADV_USD field. This valid FQL expression is the trailing 20-obs average of traded value (price*volume). The app computes 20D ADV (USD) itself in-app (Tab 3), so pulling this is optional.

sector.label: FactSet sector (point-in-time)
sector.notes: Point-in-time FactSet sector classification (correct field, Excel-verified). No date arg required; can also accept (0D). The GICS sector variant returned no data in this entitlement, so the FactSet field is used instead.

sub_industry.label: FactSet industry (point-in-time)
sub_industry.notes: Point-in-time FactSet industry classification (correct field, Excel-verified). The GICS sub-industry variant returned no data in this entitlement, so the FactSet field is used instead.

index_weight.label: Index weight in benchmark (OPTIONAL)
index_weight.notes: OPTIONAL. Constituent weight in the specified benchmark; requires a benchmark argument and the right entitlement. The universe upload already carries index weight, so this is optional.

next_earnings.label: Next earnings/report date (OPTIONAL event field)
next_earnings.notes: OPTIONAL. Next scheduled earnings/report date for event-calendar flagging; user-tested. Returns a date (serial or date value). Event flagging also works from a user-supplied column.

ex_dividend_date.label: Ex-dividend date (OPTIONAL event field)
ex_dividend_date.notes: OPTIONAL. FactSet Corporate Actions ex-dividend date; user-tested. Returns YYYYMMDD (e.g. 20260526). Inside =FDS(...) the nested string args need DOUBLED double-quotes: =FDS(<ticker>,"FCA_EVENT_DATE(0,""CASH_DIST"",""EXDATE"",""YYYYMMDD"")"). Used for deterministic mechanical-dislocation event tagging.

market_cap.label: Market capitalization (company, current)
market_cap.notes: Current company market cap in USD via the confirmed =FDS price field P_MARKET_VAL_CO; trailing 1 selects the current period. From the authoritative =FDS library. Added entry (does not affect price/volume pulls).

shares_out.label: Shares outstanding (company)
shares_out.notes: FactSet Fundamentals company shares outstanding. Template FF_ITEM(ANN,0,,,RF): 0 = most recent annual period; RF = Report Filing basis flag. From the authoritative =FDS library.

ebitda.label: EBITDA (operating)
ebitda.notes: FactSet Fundamentals operating EBITDA, most recent annual period. From the authoritative =FDS library.

net_income.label: Net income before extraordinaries
net_income.notes: FactSet Fundamentals net income before extraordinaries, most recent annual period. From the authoritative =FDS library.

enterprise_value.label: Enterprise value
enterprise_value.notes: FactSet Fundamentals enterprise value, most recent annual period. From the authoritative =FDS library.

fwd_pe_ntm.label: Forward P/E (NTM) — native FE_VALUATION
fwd_pe_ntm.notes: Native next-twelve-month consensus P/E via the confirmed FE_VALUATION function (estimates nest strings use single quotes). No in-app price/EPS computation needed. From the authoritative =FDS library.

fy1_eps.label: FY1 consensus EPS (mean)
fy1_eps.notes: FY1 forward consensus EPS mean via FE_ESTIMATE. Statistics incl MEAN/MED/NEST/STDDEV/HIGH/LOW; report basis ANNUAL (append _ROLL for rolling). NOTE: the live weekly template uses the user-tested ANN_ROLL/NOW form; this entry documents the authoritative ANNUAL/0 reference form. From the authoritative =FDS library.

company_name.label: Company name
company_name.notes: Company name (point-in-time identifier). No date arg. From the authoritative =FDS library.

gics_industry.label: GICS industry name (reference)
gics_industry.notes: GICS industry name from the reference library. For THIS entitlement the verified-working classification fields are FG_FACTSET_SECTOR / FG_FACTSET_IND (the GICS variants returned no data); FG_GICS_INDUSTRY is kept for reference. From the authoritative =FDS library.
